0DTE gamma equilibrium point. Below this = dealer short gamma accelerates selloff. Above = stabilization zone. Critical intraday pivot.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Short-term SUPPRESSED volatility regime due to massive positive 0DTE GEX (19.58B). Spot trades in positive gamma above 0DTE flip (6359). However, WEEKLY gamma flip at 6733 marks critical transition - breach triggers volatility expansion. MONTHLY negative GEX (-9.20B) creates latent structural instability.
outlook.summary: Bearish structure confirmed across all timeframes with smirk skew (ratios 1.31-1.55) and elevated PCRs (1.22-3.31). The 6700 RESONANCE level acts as multi-expiry ceiling with significant OI alignment. Spot (6620) hovers just above MONTHLY PUT wall at 6600, providing immediate dealer support. 0DTE positive gamma suppresses intraday volatility, favoring range-bound behavior between 6600-6675. Max Pain at 6500 creates gravitational pull. Key upside threat: weekly gamma flip at 6733 - if approached, expect accelerated hedging flows and volatility spike.

levels.motivazione: Tri-expiry alignment: 0DTE CALL OI 5417, WEEKLY top CALL OI 5592, MONTHLY PUT OI 17081 + CALL OI 4031. Maximum dealer defense zone with structural significance across all timeframes.
Multi-expiry PUT concentration: WEEKLY OI 7445 (highest put), MONTHLY OI 22382 (2nd highest). Institutional support zone with bearish skew validation (1.31-1.40 ratios).
MONTHLY PUT OI 22854 - highest single-strike OI in monthly expiry. Positioning just 0.3% below spot provides immediate dealer support. High volume activity in 0DTE (155K) confirms relevance.
0DTE CALL OI 10358 - dominant overhead resistance with high volume (6388). Primary intraday selling pressure zone capping upside.
Weekly gamma equilibrium point. Spot (6620) trades in negative gamma territory below this flip - approaching triggers dealer short-gamma hedging and volatility amplification.
0DTE Max Pain level 1.8% below spot. Natural price attraction target for market makers. Confluence with MONTHLY PUT OI 20687 strengthens magnetic pull.
0DTE gamma equilibrium. Spot trades 4.1% above in positive gamma regime, suppressing intraday volatility. Structural floor for dealer hedging dynamics.

0DTE Max Pain 2.0% below spot. Intraday magnetic target if downside momentum develops. Paired with Gamma Flip creates structural support zone.
